title: Andaman Law College Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Guest Faculty/ Resource Person post
shortInfo: Andaman Law College (ALC) Guest Faculty/ Resource Person Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website Andaman Law College. Has been announced through the ALC Guest Faculty/ Resource Person Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Andaman Law College Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Guest Faculty/ Resource Person post
basic_details.short_information: Andaman Law College (ALC) Guest Faculty/ Resource Person Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website Andaman Law College. Has been announced through the ALC Guest Faculty/ Resource Person Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Law, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations
qualification.details: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Law from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign university approved by BCI; must have cleared NET/SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (with exemptions and conditions for pre-2009 Ph.D. candidates).

salary_details.details: Rs.1500/- per lecture session (normally two hours) subject to maximum Rs.50,000/- per month

selection_process: Academic Scoring as per UGC 2018 Table 3B Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman Law College Guest Faculty/ Resource Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://andamanlawcollege.andamannicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Andaman Law College Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Andaman Law College Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) recruitment is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the college before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in Law, and have cleared NET/SLET/SET or be awarded a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1500/- per lecture session (normally two hours), with a maximum limit of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Academic Scoring as per UGC 2018 Table 3B, followed by the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Andaman Law College: https://andamanlawcollege.andamannicobar.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Andaman Law College?
faq.answer: The official website of Andaman Law College is https://andamanlawcollege.andamannicobar.gov.in, where you can find more details and download the application form.

faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Andaman Law College Guest Faculty/Resource Person (Law) recruitment is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the college before this deadline.
